title: フロンティア・スピリッツ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while we're hard at work training for the
upcoming NHK Mile Cup...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. Do you two have a moment?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! Howdy, Tazuna!
choice_data_list: What can we do for you?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Apologies for the short notice, Taiki Shuttle, but
you've been requested for an interview.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ooh, an interview?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I imagine this reporter sees great potential in you,
considering your current track record. They're
very eager to feature you in a segment!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: That's amazing! It'd be a real honor!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle is moving into the limelight—proof
that her talents are genuine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's taken her first step to becoming
the next Umamusume of the Year.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'll let them know.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: All right, I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Could we take a few photos of you in action
next?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Okay, sure thing! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous! The vigor you display toward your
craft is comparable to the best of the best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Etsuko Otonashi, a reporter for Twinkle Monthly,
has taken notice of Taiki Shuttle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, she has an exceptionally good eye
for spotting budding talent in the racing scene.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Phew! Did ya get some good shots?

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Each of these photos perfectly captures your
strength, Taiki Shuttle!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
The power in your leaps, the elegance in your
motion, the force behind your every step... I'll be
following your future exploits with bated breath.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Best believe I'll be runnin' my heart out! 'Cause
I'm gonna be the next Umamusume of the Year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The reporter's eyes widen upon hearing Taiki's
words.

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Oh... But your aptitude is for short-distance
races, is it not?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sure is. Why do ya ask?

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: Er, well... Are you not aware?

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
There hasn't ever been a single sprinter selected
as Umamusume of the Year.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Is that true?

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid so. Races like the Arima Kinen, Tenno
Sho, and the Japan Cup garner far more attention
from the public.

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Restricting your scope to only short-distance
races could pose a problem...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her concerns mirror my own following Taiki
Shuttle's debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But knowing Taiki...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ya don't say! Veeery interesting!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But I don't reckon that'll be a problem!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: It's not like there's any rule sayin' I can't be chosen. So no problem, right?

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Well, certainly. While there's no precedent, it's
technically not impossible...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Then that settles it! I'm not changin' my plan.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: If it hasn't been done, I'll be the first!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The first sprinter to be crowned Umamusume of
the Year! Now, don't that sound nice?

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: Oh my...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle's enthusiasm is truly a special
case—the lack of a precedent is but a trivial
matter to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her words renew my conviction.
choice_data_list:
We're in for a challenge, but let's give it our
best!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: That's...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Huh? That's what?

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: That's...

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: Simply amazing!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
The thorny path ahead has never been
conquered—yet the two of you press on,
abandoning the concept of fear itself!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... How inspirational to witness a trainer
willing to endure any obstacle for the sake of
their trainee, be it spines prickling your skin or
hot sauce stinging your wounds!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to follow you two on your journey! I'll
keep record of your every step!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Thanks! ♪ Make sure to keep your eyes peeled!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Cause I've got a mighty fantastic dream to show
ya...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: And it's sure to make ya happy!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Yes, I'm looking forward to it!
